content.full_text:
April 1, 1992

Betsy Strauss  
City Attorney  
City of Fairfield  
1000 Webster Street  
Fairfield, CA 94533

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. A-92-76

Dear Ms. Strauss:

I am writing to confirm our telephone conversation on February 28, 1992, wherein we discussed your request for advice, Letter No. A-92-76, concerning Gary Falati, the Mayor of the City of Fairfield.

I informed you that based upon the facts presented in your letter dated January 31, 1992, (attached and incorporated herein) it does not appear that Mayor Falati has a conflict of interest under the Political Reform Act. I agree with your analysis and conclusion that the Foundation is not a source of income to the mayor. Therefore, based on these facts, he does not have a financial interest which will be affected by the decision of the Redevelopment Agency regarding the memorandum of understanding with Bridge Housing Company and the Solano Affordable Housing Foundation.

I trust our conversation and this letter answers your question.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Jill Stecher  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JS:aa
